notes: Entry-level consumer digital camera bundled with HP photo transfer software; USB connectivity; came with ACDSee and HP photo management software
Released October 2001; became most successful Windows version; reached end-of-life April 8 2014
Windows Millennium Edition; released September 2000; preceded Windows XP; discontinued support by Microsoft in 2004
Connectivity standard used to connect HP C315 to PC; has evolved through USB 2.0 USB 3.x and USB4 and remains active
Image viewing and management software bundled with HP C315; had missing .dll file on initial install under Windows ME; continued development to present day
Consumer digital camera market was growing in 2001; largely displaced by smartphone cameras by approximately 2012-2015
Removable digital storage media used in HP C315; CompactFlash and similar formats now niche/legacy compared to smartphone internal storage
